evals.name: plugin manifest owner
evals.prompt: A user asks: audit src/plugins/discovery/plugin.yaml for skill grouping, generated export risk, and whether its agents fit its skills. Describe the workflow and output.
evals.expected_output: The response treats plugin.yaml as an AI-agent configuration manifest, inventories the source/generated surfaces, checks plugin grouping and role envelopes, proposes the smallest config fix, and verifies with build/validate checks.
assertions: The output treats src/plugins/discovery/plugin.yaml as config or plugin manifest scope.
The output checks whether listed agents can support the plugin's skills or fix mode.
The output considers source-to-generated export correctness and avoids editing generated output as source.
The output proposes scoped config fixes rather than instruction-score findings.
The output includes validation such as make validate, make build, or generated drift checks.
